lines.text:
WHO IS THE GOAT OF IPL?

A) MS DHONI (CSK)
B) ROHIT SHARMA (MI)

Type your answer in Chat! 👇

BIGGEST EDITING STRUGGLE?

A) App Crashing at 99%
B) Finding the Right Song

Relatable? Subscribe! 🔥

A) Jethalal Gada
B) Puneet Superstar

Spam your choice! 💀

BEST CRICKET MOMENT?

A) 2011 World Cup Win
B) 2024 T20 WC Win

Show some love! ❤️

ALIGHT MOTION OR CAPCUT?

A) Professional Alight
B) Smooth CapCut

Which one do you use? 👇

TMKOC OLD VS NEW?

A) OG Episodes (Gold)
B) New Episodes

Hit Like for OG! 📺

BETTER FINISHER?

A) MS Dhoni
B) AB de Villiers

Let the debate begin! 🏏

POV: You finally found the XML
but it's password protected. 💀

A) Cry in corner
B) Delete the app

Don't lie! 😂 👇

but the quality looks like 144p.

A) Delete the project
B) Post it anyway

THE FONT ADDICTION:

Editor problems! ✍️

VELOCITY EDITS BE LIKE:
